No internet bypass, no remote hacks  Potential Risks and Best Practices: Phishing Scams: ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US)  The most serious risk is user error, such as typing the recovery phrase into a computer/phone (never do this) or purchasing a device from an unauthorised ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US)  reseller. Previous Data Breach: In 2020, Ledger's marketing database was hacked,  ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US) exposing personal information (names, addresses) of customers, resulting in phishing campaigns. Use Official Sources:  ⭕⚽+1-855-618-8738 ⭕(US) Always purchase from the Official Ledger Shop.
